src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the version string in the @Generated annotation to reflect the new JHipster generator version.
Reformat the annotation interface definition to use a single-line brace style.
Explicitly exclude H2 Console auto-configuration to disable the web interface in production or non-dev environments.
Rename the logger field from 'log' to 'LOG' to follow standard Java naming conventions for static final fields.
Replace explicit type declaration with 'var' for the SpringApplication instance to leverage Java 10+ local variable type inference.
Replace explicit String type with 'var' for the hostAddress variable to leverage local variable type inference.
Extract the application name property into a dedicated variable to improve readability and avoid repeated property lookups.
Reformat the Optional chain for protocol determination to improve vertical alignment and readability.
Reformat the Optional chain for context path determination to improve vertical alignment and readability.
Adjust indentation of the multi-line log message string to align with the method call for better visual structure.
Replace explicit Logger type declaration with var to utilize local variable type inference.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Logger log = logger(joinPoint); -> var log = logger(joinPoint);

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace ternary operator with String.valueOf to safely handle null causes in logging without potential NPE or verbose checks.
Adjust indentation and line breaks in method calls and annotations to match updated code style preferences.
Rename the instance logger field to a static final field following standard Java logging conventions.
Replace explicit type declaration with 'var' for local variable type inference.
Replace deprecated single marker access with the new marker list API to comply with SLF4J 2.x requirements in Java 21 environments.
Rename the constant array from SAFE_LOGGERS to SAFE_LOGS for better semantic clarity.
Remove imports that are no longer used in the class to clean up the code.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed imports for ZoneId, Collections, CustomConversions, and ReactiveDataAccessStrategy.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Enable configuration properties for H2 console to allow conditional bean creation based on properties.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Added @EnableConfigurationProperties(H2ConsoleProperties.class) and @ConditionalOnProperty for the h2TCPServer bean.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update logger declaration to use a static final field instead of an instance field, following modern Java logging conventions.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed 'private final Logger log' to 'private static final Logger LOG' and updated usage.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace explicit type declaration with 'var' for local variable type inference, a feature available since Java 10.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed 'int port' to 'var port' in getValidPortForH2 method.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace explicit type declaration with 'var' for local variable inference.
Migrate logger instance from private final field to private static final field following modern Java logging conventions.
Replace deprecated Environment.acceptsProfiles(Profiles.of(...)) with Environment.matchesProfiles(...) to align with newer Spring Boot API.
Convert Liquibase contexts collection to comma-delimited string before setting, handling null/empty cases explicitly.
Convert Liquibase label filter collection to comma-delimited string before setting, handling null/empty cases explicitly.
Inject ConsulRegistration to retrieve the service instance ID for logging metadata.
Include the Consul instance ID in the custom logging fields map.
Replace explicit type declarations with var for local variables to modernize code style.
Remove the @EnableWebFluxSecurity annotation which is no longer required in recent Spring Security versions.
Update CORS configuration to use the new withDefaults() API required by newer Spring Security versions.
Update OAuth2 resource server JWT configuration to use the new withDefaults() API required by newer Spring Security versions.
Remove the unused static import for AUTHORITIES_KEY as it is no longer referenced in the class.
Add SLF4J logger imports and instance to enable logging of unknown JWT errors.
Add specific error tracking for malformed tokens and unknown errors in the reactive JWT decoder chain.
Add logging for unknown errors in the synchronous exception handling block.
Remove imports related to JWT authentication conversion that are no longer used after removing the bean.
Remove the ReactiveJwtAuthenticationConverter bean, likely because the configuration is handled differently or automatically in the newer Spring Security version.
Change the CORS bean definition to return CorsConfigurationSource instead of CorsWebFilter to align with modern Spring WebFlux configuration practices.
Update imports to remove CorsWebFilter and add CorsConfigurationSource to match the new bean return type.
Convert instance logger field to a static final logger field for better performance and standard Java logging conventions.
Extract H2 console enablement logic into a dedicated method to improve readability and allow for more specific property checks.
